title: blechnum occidentale var. campylote
intro: Blechnum occidentale var. campylote, also known as the Campylotus fern or Lady fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Blechnum occidentale var. campylote include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. Blechnum occidentale var. campylote can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and it has also been used in traditional remedies as a poultice or ointment to apply topically to the affected area.
